name: Chicken Noodle Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-quart casserole, combine chicken, 4 cups hot water, celery, carrots, basil, rosemary, pepper and salt.
2. Microwave at High for 30-40 minutes, or until the chicken falls easily from the bone, stirring twice during cooking.
3. Remove chicken from the bones. Discard bones and skin. Dice meat and return to casserole.
4. Add 2 cups hot water and noodles. Cover. Microwave at High for 8-10 minutes, or until water boils.
5. Continue microwaving at High for 7-10 minutes, or until noodles are tender.
